euler-dao.name: Euler DAO
euler-dao.description: Euler DAO is responsible for the governance and development of the Euler protocol and related infrastructure.

clearstar.name: Clearstar
clearstar.description: Clearstar is a third-party curator using Euler infrastructure to configure vaults across selected decentralized markets. The curator is responsible for asset selection, vault parameter configuration, and management of the vaults it configures.

gauntlet.name: Gauntlet
gauntlet.description: Gauntlet is a third-party curator using Euler infrastructure to configure markets informed by risk modeling and parameter analysis. The curator is responsible for asset selection, vault parameter configuration, and management of the vaults it configures.
